waiting_screen_nationality.origin: Which country are you visiting from?

waiting_screen_input.input_label: Please fill out the information below to help us with your waiting list!
waiting_screen_input.name_label: This is how we'll call you.
waiting_screen_input.party_size_label: How many people are in your party?
waiting_screen_input.contact_label: If anything comes up, we will contact you at this number.
waiting_screen_input.note_label: Is there anything you'd like us to inform the restaurant about?

waiting_screen_menu.title: Select Menu
waiting_screen_menu.no_menus: No menus available at the moment
waiting_screen_menu.select_at_least_one: Please select at least one menu item
waiting_screen_menu.one_menu_per_person_error: Please select the same number of menu items as the number of people

waiting_screen_preview.preview_label: We will proceed with the waiting list based on the information you provided!

waiting_screen.label_1: Thank you! Your information has been successfully registered!
waiting_screen.label_2: Please wait a moment the restaurant will call you shortly.
waiting_screen.menu_label: How about checking the menu while you wait?

cancel_popup.message: Are you sure you want to cancel your reservation?

completed_screen.title: Thank you for visiting!
completed_screen.message: Step right this way, our staff will guide you.

waiting_screen.reset_confirm_text: If you would like to reset, please press the button below.

user.title: Cancelled
user.body: Thank you for visiting. If you wish to register again, please scan the QR code again.

store.title: Cancelled
store.body: We apologize deeply. Your reservation was cancelled by the store. Please contact the staff for assistance.

absence.title: Cancelled
absence.body: Your reservation was cancelled because you were not present when called. Please scan the QR code again to re-register.

chat_bot.greeting: Hello! Please let me know if you have any questions about your order or the store.

errors.429: Sorry, we are experiencing high traffic. Please try again later.
errors.general: An error occurred. Please try again later.

google_map_popup.message: Do you want to open Google Maps?
